OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents an individual item ordered within the Mirinha's Tracker app.

id.description: Unique identifier for the order item.

itemName.description: The name of the item ordered.

quantity.description: The quantity of the item ordered. Defaults to 1 if not specified.

orderDateTime.description: The date and time when the item was ordered.

itemGroup.description: The group to which the item belongs (e.g., Fiados salão, Fiados rua, Vendas rua, Vendas salão).

extrasValue.description: The value of the 'EXTRAS' item, tracked separately.

DailyReport.title: DailyReport
DailyReport.description: Represents a summarized report for a single day of sales.

id.description: Unique identifier for the report, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

timestamp.description: The date and time when the report was saved.

reportData.description: The summarized data for the report.

rawItems.description: A complete list of all individual order items for that day.

BomboniereItem.title: BomboniereItem
BomboniereItem.description: Represents an item available for sale in the bomboniere.

id.description: Unique identifier for the bomboniere item.

stock.description: The current stock quantity of the item.

FavoriteClient.title: FavoriteClient
FavoriteClient.description: Represents a favorite client with a predefined order for quick entry.

id.description: Unique identifier for the favorite client.

command.description: The raw command string representing the client's usual order (e.g., 'PF coquinha').

definition.description: Stores details about each order item, including name, price, quantity, date/time, item group, and extras value.

params.name: orderItemId
params.description: Unique identifier for the order item.

definition.description: Stores the final summarized report for each day.

params.name: reportId
params.description: Unique identifier for the daily report (YYYY-MM-DD).

definition.description: Stores the list of all available bomboniere items, their prices, and stock.

params.name: bomboniereItemId
params.description: Unique identifier for the bomboniere item.

definition.description: Stores the list of favorite clients for quick order entries.

params.name: favoriteClientId
params.description: Unique identifier for the favorite client.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure is designed to support Mirinha's Tracker app, focusing on real-time access and data persistence. The primary entity `OrderItem` stores details of each order. A `daily_reports` collection stores historical end-of-day summaries. A `bomboniere_items` collection stores the list of bomboniere items. Finally, a `favorite_clients` collection is added to store the list of favorite clients and their predefined orders, ensuring all app data is synchronized across all devices. This allows for long-term analysis without needing to query the entire `order_items` collection. To ensure authorization independence (CRITICAL), we rely solely on `request.auth.uid` and do not use `get()` calls in our security rules. This simplifies security and enables atomic operations.

Structural Segregation (Homogeneous Security Posture):  All documents in the `order_items`, `daily_reports`, `bomboniere_items` and `favorite_clients` collections share the same public security requirements. This ensures we can use simple rules without needing to filter data based on its content.

Data Clarity and Predictability: Each document schema is clear and explicit.

QAPs (Rules are not Filters): Since we are using a flat collection structure with all documents having the same security requirements, listing operations are inherently secure.
